COFINFAD · Visual Analytics · Group 7

Colombian Fintech
Customer Analytics

An interactive visual analytics platform built on 48,723 customer records from a Colombian fintech dataset — uncovering who your customers are, how they engage, and which groups are at highest risk of churning.

Explore the Project ▶ Launch Shiny App

Customer Records

Analytical Modules

R Shiny
Platform
Background

Why This Project Matters

Colombia's fintech sector has grown rapidly over the past decade, driven by rising smartphone penetration, government-led financial inclusion initiatives, and a young, digitally active population. By 2024, the country hosted over 300 active fintech companies — yet most still lacked robust tools to understand customer behaviour at scale.

This project uses the COFINFAD (Colombian Fintech Financial Analytics Dataset) — a 48,723-record customer file with 57 features spanning demographics, product ownership, transaction behaviour, digital engagement, satisfaction scores, churn probability, and customer lifetime value.

Our goal is to build a web-enabled visual analytics application that turns raw data into an interactive decision-support system — enabling product managers, CRM teams, and analysts to explore customer dynamics without writing a single line of code.

Colombian Fintech Context

Colombia ranks among the top 3 fintech markets in Latin America. The dataset spans 20+ departments, capturing rich geographic and socioeconomic variation across a diverse customer base.

The COFINFAD Dataset

48,723 customer records · 57 variables · demographics, acquisition channels, product ownership (savings, credit, loans, investments, insurance), engagement behaviour, satisfaction, NPS, churn probability, and customer lifetime value.

Business Questions Addressed

Who are our customers and where are they? Which segments churn most? Which customers generate the highest lifetime value? Where should retention and cross-selling efforts be focused?

Analytical Modules

A Progressive Analytical Journey

Three interconnected modules guide users from a broad population overview down to targeted retention strategies.

1
Customer Structure
→
2
Engagement & Experience
→
3
Retention & Value
01

Customer Overview & Segmentation

Understand the demographic and geographic structure of the customer base. Explore how age, income bracket, and acquisition channel relate to segment membership and product adoption.

  • Segment distribution by age group
  • Acquisition channel breakdown
  • Financial product adoption rates
  • City-level behavioural clustering heatmap
02

Customer Engagement & Experience

Analyse how customers interact with the platform through app usage, feature diversity, and transaction activity. Measure service quality through satisfaction, NPS, and complaint patterns.

  • App login frequency by segment
  • Satisfaction and NPS distributions
  • Top complaint topic analysis
  • Support tickets vs satisfaction scatter
03

Retention Risk & Customer Value

Identify customers most likely to churn and those generating the highest long-term value. Inform targeted retention and growth strategies.

  • Churn probability distribution
  • CLV tier breakdown
  • Churn vs CLV risk-value scatter
  • Segment-level retention prioritisation
Deliverables

Project Components

Everything built as part of this project — interactive app, proposal, module write-ups, and research poster.

Shiny Application

Fully interactive R Shiny dashboard with three analytical modules, real-time sidebar filters, and plotly visualisations. Deployed on shinyapps.io.

Launch App →

Project Proposal

Full proposal including dataset overview, data preparation notes, module methodology, prototype sketches, and project schedule.

View Proposal →

Module Write-ups

Technical documentation per module: data wrangling, visualisation design rationale, interaction principles, and Shiny UI decisions.

View Modules →

Project Poster

A1 format research poster covering problem statement, methodology, key findings, and future directions for the course showcase.

View Poster →
Technology

Built With

All packages on CRAN  ·  App on shinyapps.io  ·  Website on Netlify
